news_data.title: Credit Suisse Reports $7.9B Loss After Archegos Collapse
news_data.snippet: Prime brokerage unit suffered catastrophic losses from the Archegos Capital margin call debacle.

news_data.title: Credit Suisse Greensill Scandal Freezes $10B in Funds
news_data.snippet: Investors trapped after supply-chain finance funds linked to Greensill Capital were suspended.

news_data.title: UBS Agrees to Emergency Acquisition of Credit Suisse
news_data.snippet: Swiss regulators brokered the $3.2B takeover to prevent systemic banking crisis, wiping out AT1 bondholders.

news_data.title: Credit Suisse Clients Pull $120B in Assets
news_data.snippet: Wealth management outflows accelerated as clients lost confidence in the bank's stability and governance.

news_data.title: Credit Suisse Compliance Failures Span Over a Decade
news_data.snippet: Internal review revealed systemic risk management failures, including Mozambique loan fraud and tax evasion.

social_data.title: Credit Suisse Is the New Lehman
social_data.snippet: CDS spreads blowing out, deposits fleeing, stock at all-time lows. This bank is done.

social_data.title: CS Wealth Management Client
social_data.snippet: Moved my family's accounts to UBS last month. Should have done it after Archegos. Trust is gone.

social_data.title: AT1 Bondholders Wiped Out Thread
social_data.snippet: $17B in AT1 bonds written to zero while equity got $3.2B. This inversion of hierarchy is unprecedented.

review_data.title: Credit Suisse Employee Review — Investment Banking
review_data.snippet: Morale collapsed years ago. Constant restructuring, leadership turnover, and reputational damage made it unbearable.

review_data.title: Credit Suisse Employee Review — Compliance
review_data.snippet: We flagged risks for years. Nobody listened. Watching the bank die in slow motion was agonizing.
